faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Paramus, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our ant control services in Paramus range from $350 to $550 depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and ant species involved. This includes inspection, treatment, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination. We provide free estimates for all Paramus properties.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Paramus?
faqs.answer: Paramus properties commonly experience issues with odorous house ants, pavement ants, carpenter ants, and occasionally pharaoh ants in commercial buildings. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in older Paramus homes. Our technicians identify the species to apply the most effective treatment method.

Given our familiarity with Bergen County and proximity to Paramus, we can typically arrive within hours of your call during business hours. Emergency services are available for severe infestations affecting businesses or causing structural concerns.
